scripts.dev:machines: cross-env SITE_CODE=machines DATABASE_PATH=./data/machines.db PORT=3001 JWT_SECRET=jeouyang-shared-sso-secret-change-in-production next dev -p 3001
scripts.dev:components: cross-env SITE_CODE=components DATABASE_PATH=./data/components.db PORT=3002 JWT_SECRET=jeouyang-shared-sso-secret-change-in-production next dev -p 3002
scripts.start:machines: cross-env SITE_CODE=machines DATABASE_PATH=./data/machines.db PORT=3001 JWT_SECRET=jeouyang-shared-sso-secret-change-in-production next start -p 3001
scripts.start:components: cross-env SITE_CODE=components DATABASE_PATH=./data/components.db PORT=3002 JWT_SECRET=jeouyang-shared-sso-secret-change-in-production next start -p 3002
scripts.setup:all: npm run split-db && npm run migrate-i18n && npm run seed-translations
